Author: NennMichSchinken
Name: HamMeter
Changelog: Reworked the job tags with a glass look. The border and text now follow each job's colour so they stay readable. Fixed the bar gradient not reaching the rounded left/right ends.
Description: HamMeter is a minimalist combat tracker and damage meter for Final Fantasy XIV, built with a strict focus on an easy-to-read layout! It reads encounter data from IINACT over Dalamud IPC.
Punchline: A minimalist, easy-to-read combat tracker for FFXIV.
